chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-633 of 2014 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 19.02.2019 None present for petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G. alongwith Dr. Anwar Ali CRMO/DHO Umerkot. Learned Additional Advocate General Sindh has filed comments of respondents No.2 and 3; taken on record. This petition was filed on 08.04.2014; thereafter the record reflects that neither the petitioner not his Counsel has taken any interest to get this matter posted for proceeding on merit even today no one is present on behalf of the petitioner and no intimation is received on his behalf. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
